---
title: "John Pikachu"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/headshot.png
  image-width: 270px
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your.email@example.com
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

</br>
Hi, my name is **John Pikachu 👋**.
</br></br>I build portfolio websites that help people showcase their work and experience.

---

## Education

**University of British Columbia** — Vancouver, BC
*</br>M.Sc. in Computer Science* | 2024 – 2026

**University of British Columbia** — Vancouver, BC
*</br>B.Sc. in Computer Science* | 2016 – 2021

---

## Experience

**Software Development Engineer**
</br>Northshore Analytics Ltd. | 2021 – Present

- Developed data-driven software solutions
- Maintained and improved internal systems

---

**Product Engineering Intern**
</br>Innovatech Solutions Inc. | 2020 – 2021

- Assisted in product development and testing
- Supported engineering design implementation
